/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/eventbus/eventbus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/router/router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/service/handler/basehandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/service/handler/echohandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/service/echo/echoservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/infra/epollserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flowscope_server.dir/common/forwarder.cpp.o -o flowscope_server
